title: Bond to remain on file; copy admissible in evidence
doc_html:
§188.  Bond to remain on file; copy admissible in evidence

All bonds must remain on file in the office of the recorder of mortgages and a duly certified copy shall always be admissible in evidence.
doc_text:
§188.  Bond to remain on file; copy admissible in evidence
All bonds must remain on file in the office of the recorder of mortgages and a duly certified copy shall always be admissible in evidence.
